name: [GRIDHAND] Payment Chaser Agent - Invoice overdue 7 days → firm SMS + email

gridhand.scenario: Invoice overdue 7 days → firm SMS + email
gridhand.description: When an invoice remains unpaid for 7 days, GRIDHAND's automation kicks in, triggering a firm but polite SMS message to the customer's phone number on file via the Twilio app, as well as a complementary email sent through Mailchimp, both of which are customized with the business's branding and include a link to pay the outstanding balance online. This dual-notification approach ensures that customers are reminded of their overdue payment in multiple ways, increasing the likelihood of prompt settlement. By automating this follow-up process, the business owner can reduce the time spent on accounts receivable and minimize the risk of late payments, resulting in a significant improvement to their cash flow and overall financial health.
